name: Lee Hon

contactInfo.office: 101 W. Church St., Suite 300, Livingston, TX 77351

bio: Lee Hon serves as the District Attorney for Polk County, prosecuting felony criminal cases in the Livingston area. He is committed to seeking justice and protecting the residents of Polk County.
campaignPromises: Prosecute violent offenders to the fullest extent of the law
Address drug crime in Polk County communities
Support victims throughout the criminal justice process
Run an efficient and transparent DA's office
Collaborate with law enforcement to improve public safety
